channel.title: AI on Uyen's blog
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Uyen's blog

item.title: Symbolic AI (1): Introduction and example
item.description:
This post belong to series neural - symbolic AI

Materials: Notion page for GOAI

What is symbolic AI?

Symbolic Artificial Intelligence (A Good OldFashioned AI - GOAI) is the term for the collection of all methods in artificial intelligence research that are based on high-level “symbolic” (human-readable) representations of problems, logic and search. See Stefan Woltran slides

Symbolic AI is a whole difference approach from Machine Learning, which harnessing the power of data and statistical methods, but using knowledge and logic based instead.

Materials: Notion page for GOAI

Proposition Logic

Fisrt Order Language

Fuzzy Logic
